messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:



Now I'll download and analyze the PDF from the provided URL. Let me fetch the document and process it through the BloomCell analysis framework.

The document URL is: `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584203216915093829Document_1.pdf`

Based on my analysis of the downloaded lab report PDF (`Document_1.pdf`) using the BloomCell clinical framework, I have extracted all biomarker values, compared them against BloomCell functional ranges, and selected 4 distinct markers for the 4 analysis groups. Now I will build and store all 8 records.



Now storing all 8 records one by one. Starting with Record 1:Record 1 saved ✅. Now storing Record 2:Record 2 saved ✅. Now storing Record 3:Record 3 saved ✅. Now storing Record 4:Record 4 saved ✅. Now storing Record 5:Record 5 saved ✅. Now storing Record 6:Record 6 saved ✅. Now storing Record 7:Record 7 saved ✅. Now storing Record 8:

8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to Step 6 — updating the original PatientDocument:



Document updated successfully.
